name: openagent
description: Open-source, cross-platform agentic AI IDE with MCP/Skills/Marketplace support and provider-agnostic adapters.

scripts.test: node --test packages/agent-harness/test/**/*.test.js packages/adapters/test/**/*.test.js packages/cli/test/**/*.test.js packages/skills/test/**/*.test.js packages/mcp-gateway/test/**/*.test.js packages/plugins/test/**/*.test.js
